name: Shawn's Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small can or jar of pimento, chopped
2 large carrots, diced into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain all the beans and chop the vegetables.
2. Mix together in a bowl and transfer to a glass gallon jar.
3. In a medium saucepan, mix dressing ingredients together.
4. Heat until sugar has dissolved.
5. Pour over the beans and mix thoroughly.
6. Let sit in the fridge for at least 24 hours to allow the dressing and beans to blend.
7. The longer it sits, the better it is. It will keep in the fridge for weeks.
Note: I find that I have to make four times the brine recipe to cover the beans in a one-gallon jar.
